title: Into the Temple
outline: Elena makes the bold decision to enter the temple immediately, despite the Cult's presence. Inside, she discovers the first chamber filled with ancient runes that she can somehow read - a rare gift her uncle mentioned but she never believed she possessed. The runes tell a warning about the temple's guardians. As her team explores deeper, they trigger an ancient defense mechanism.
additional_notes: This scene reveals Elena's latent ability to read runes. Build tension as the temple's defenses activate. The Cult should still be a background threat - Elena knows they're coming. Show Elena's awe at finally being inside the temple her uncle sought for so long.
